items.reason: Covers core LogSampler rate normalization, derivation, threshold sampling, event distribution, fatal bypass, disabled fast path, and concurrent config/hot-path reads.
Covers proto and flag config update behavior, invalid-config retention, disabled/full-rate folding, ppm boundaries, and request-only derivation.
Covers LOG/PLOG macro integration, payload suppression, diagnostic supplement sampling, fatal/check bypass, VLOG behavior, and background bypass.
Covers access sampling, request-sampled-in force-retention, REQUEST_OUT bypass, per-event access sampling, access type mapping, and logSampled formatting.
Covers the new typed AccessRecorder facades, deferred providers, sampled-out provider skipping, stream/request-out recorders, and key lifetime cases.
Covers MetaPb log_sample_state propagation for sampler-disabled, full-rate, zero-rate, random decisions, and undecided receiver behavior.
Adds system coverage for worker-to-client sampler config delivery and cross-process request sampling consistency through KV operations.
Adds hot-path performance guardrails for 4000 QPS request sampling, sampled-out payload suppression, access sampling, and sampler-only decision cost.
Updates log message tests from LogRateLimiter to LogSampler and checks sampled-in and rejected request stream-expression evaluation.
Updates access-log sampled marker assertions for the new sampler-enabled and sampler-disabled request semantics.
Touched but does not exercise new sampler flag dynamic update paths, including batch validation, rollback on invalid sampler rates, and explicit-state behavior in Flags::UpdateFlagParameter.
